description: Contains Japanese patent classification codes (FI and F-terms) assigned to patent applications filed in Japan.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the patent application.

columns.name: jp_class_scheme
columns.description: Japanese classification scheme used (e.g., FI, F-term).

columns.name: jp_class_symbol
columns.description: Japanese classification code assigned to the application.
